name: Recall.ai
pricing_notes: Per-bot-hour pricing; starts ~$0.45/hour per bot; volume discounts available

auth.notes: Authorization: Token header; per-environment API keys

performance.notes: Bot join latency 5-30s; real-time transcription latency ~500ms; recording retrieval varies

agent_readiness.notes: Meeting bot infrastructure as a service. Bot joins Zoom/Teams/Google Meet/Webex. Real-time transcription, recording, speaker diarization. Webhook on meeting events. Used by AI note-taking apps (Fireflies, Otter, etc.). REST API + webhooks.

gotchas: Per-bot-hour pricing adds up for long/frequent meetings
Platform consent requirements (must disclose bot in meeting)
Zoom/Teams platform changes can break bot behavior
Real-time transcription accuracy depends on audio quality
Recording storage costs separate from bot costs
best_when: Building meeting intelligence applications (note-takers, CRM sync, coaching tools)
Agents that need to observe or participate in video meetings
Teams wanting infrastructure-as-a-service for meeting bots vs building their own
Multi-platform meeting support (Zoom + Teams + Meet from one API)
avoid_when: Cost-sensitive use cases with high meeting volume
summary: Recall.ai provides meeting bot infrastructure-as-a-service for building meeting intelligence applications. Bots join Zoom, Teams, Meet, and Webex to provide real-time transcription, recording, and speaker diarization via webhooks. Used by AI note-taking apps as their backend. Best for teams building meeting-related AI products without building bot infrastructure themselves.
